items.title: Kenyans fighting illegally for Russia in Ukraine to be granted amnesty
items.dek: It is illegal for Kenyans to serve in foreign armies and can carry a sentence of up to 10 years in jail.
items.body: It is illegal for Kenyans to serve in foreign armies and can carry a sentence of up to 10 years in jail.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israeli settlers target Palestinian villages in occupied West Bank, attacking people and properties
items.dek: The violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike.
items.body: The violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist airport security as DHS shutdown continues
items.dek: Travellers have faced hours-long waits at airports around the country as a partial government shutdown has left TSA agents without pay.
items.body: Travellers have faced hours-long waits at airports around the country as a partial government shutdown has left TSA agents without pay.
items.author: IriLine Desk
